location: Dropped by Festering Fingerprint Vyke, an NPC invader fought outside the Church of Inhibition in northeastern Liurnia of the Lakes, past the Village of the Frenzied Flame.
tactics: Head toward the Church of Inhibition past the Village of the Frenzied Flame; Vyke invades if you linger near the church ruins too long.
Sprint inside to rest at the Church of Inhibition grace first if you want the checkpoint locked in before fighting him.
Vyke fights with fire-and-madness thrusts (Frenzyflame Thrust) that build Madness on hit and include an aerial spinning attack - avoid standing in the lingering flame.

Don't confuse him with the separate mini-boss version of Vyke fought later in the Lord Contender's Evergaol near the First Church of Marika in the Mountaintops of the Giants - only this Liurnia invader drops the War Spear.
lore: The war spear of Vyke, a Knight of the Roundtable Hold, left scorched and blistered by his exposure to the yellow flame of frenzy - a corruption that lingers in the weapon as combined fire and madness damage.

builds.name: Dexterity/Faith Madness-Fire
builds.why: C-tier Dexterity scaling plus a built-in Madness buildup and fire damage make this a strong fast-hitting Dex/Faith weapon, especially potent in PvP where madness procs stun opponents.

builds.name: Faith Frenzied-Flame Hybrid
builds.why: Faith scaling boosts the spear's fire damage directly, letting a Faith-leaning build pair its own fire/madness proc with fire incantations for a frenzied-flame-themed kit.
